# Agent Memory Contract (Generated)

Contract: `AGENT-MEMORY-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `agent-memory`
Version: `2026-03-22`

Rules: 6

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-MEM-001 | must | continuity-facts-only | Agent Memory stores continuity facts only and excludes prompt/runtime orchestration. |
| R-MEM-002 | must | fixed-memory-classes | Memory class is fixed to PUBLIC_SHARED, WORLD_SHARED, or DYADIC. |
| R-MEM-003 | must | dyadic-isolation | DYADIC memory is strictly isolated by agentId and userId. |
| R-MEM-004 | must | explicit-memory-write | Memory writes are explicit, auditable, and provenance-bearing. |
| R-MEM-005 | must | private-delete-boundary | Private deletion rights apply to DYADIC memory and must not silently damage shared continuity. |
| R-MEM-006 | must | no-auto-materialization | History and state may inform memory writes but do not auto-materialize memory by default; run-mode permissions must remain explicit in the commit authorization matrix. |

Entities: 1

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| AgentMemoryEntry | AgentMemory | id, agentId, type, content, importance | metadata, actorRefs, evidenceRefs |

Required operations: 3
- GET /api/agent/accounts/{id}/memory/core
- GET /api/agent/accounts/{id}/memory/dyadic/{userId}
- POST /api/agent/accounts/{id}/memory/commits

Secondary operations: 2
- DELETE /api/agent/accounts/{id}/memory/dyadic/{userId}/{memoryId}
- DELETE /api/agent/accounts/{id}/memory/dyadic/{userId}
